source_title: Guide to the National Merit Scholarship Program - 2023 Program
reconciliation_notes: The 400-student Virginia-location packet contains one student each at St. Anne's-Belfield, The Madeira School, and Virginia Episcopal School; removing those boarding-school blocks gives 397. NMSC does not publish its school-to-selection-unit crosswalk, so the assignment is an evidence-backed inference.

source_title: Guide to the National Merit Scholarship Program - 2024 Program
reconciliation_notes: Removing the one Madeira boarding-school student from the 470-student Virginia-location packet explains one of the three students and the entire one-school difference; two students remain unidentified and must not be assigned to a school or selection unit.

source_title: Guide to the National Merit Scholarship Program - 2025 Program
reconciliation_notes: The official Virginia state-selection-unit total is source-backed, but no complete Virginia-location list is available; boarding scope and the location difference cannot be reconciled.

source_title: Guide to the National Merit Scholarship Program - 2026 Program
reconciliation_notes: The 494-student Virginia-location packet contains four students at The Madeira School and one at Miller School of Albemarle; removing those boarding-school blocks gives 489 and reduces 102 printed school labels to 100. NMSC does not publish its school-to-selection-unit crosswalk, so the assignment is an evidence-backed inference.
